name: trace_window_commit_latency
description: v2.7.3 W3: BOTH real commit shapes are measured through the commit dispatch (D3, latency-truth rule: measure before optimizing): shape 1 = in-place reconcile (covering window [2026-05-28..2026-08-13] keeping the auto-fit tick set, nothing enters/leaves), shape 2 = structural (shrink to [2026-06-15..2026-07-27] hides items -> delete/create of the entering/leaving prims). The driver owns window_commit_budget <= 2000ms per shape (1s target; p50 recorded, m6/SR-WIN-28); OPPHASES asserts fastPath=false for every commit (window commits are hard-ineligible for the scene-diff fast path, SR-WIN-24) and PP_PROJ is rewritten to the final window (pad 0, minDay==windowStart); taskCount never dips to 0 mid-trace (paint-lock/no-flash proxy, SR-WIN-25).
